scripts.build:ios: cd mobile && npx eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.build:android: cd mobile && npx eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.postinstall: node -e "var env = Object.assign({}, process.env); if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') { delete env.NODE_ENV; require('child_process').execSync('npm install --prefix backend --omit=dev', { stdio: 'inherit', env: env }); } else { require('child_process').execSync('npm install --prefix backend', { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
